edges.original_sentence: The causes of the extirpation of this species were attributed to the rapid and radical change of the Great Plains ecosystem from native grasslands to cultivated farmland, and the inevitable hunting, trapping and poisoning programmes which accompany such habitat transformation (Carlington, 1980; Weagle & Smeeton, 1995).

edges.subject: causal_mosaic:node:8d3753cb70b3
edges.original_sentence: The results showed that the survival of the 41 captive-raised juveniles used in the spring release experiment (7.4 per cent) was significantly lower than that of the 33 adult, wild, translocated swift foxes from the USA (58.9 per cent) (Brechtel et al., 1993).

source_spans.text: The results showed that the survival of the 41 captive-raised juveniles used in the spring release experiment (7.4 per cent) was significantly lower than that of the 33 adult, wild, translocated swift foxes from the USA (58.9 per cent) (Brechtel et al., 1993).
